programs.title: SAS: AUS v ENG
programs.desc: There's a surprise twist for recruits during the marksman task. Later, they tackle claustrophobic tunnels before a beasting pushes more than one recruit to their limit.

programs.title: The Front Bar
programs.desc: Join Sam Pang, Mick Molloy and Andy Maher as they share a laugh about the world of AFL and catch up with stars of yesteryear and today.

programs.title: Unfiltered
programs.desc: Hamish McLachlan sits down with some of the AFL's most prominent personalities for in depth conversations revealing, challenges, triumphs, and vulnerabilities, beyond their sporting achievements.

programs.title: The Agenda Setters
programs.desc: Footy’s home of hard-hitting opinions, breaking news, and respected analysis. Seven’s team of trusted and respected footy voices tackle the biggest topics and take viewers behind the headlines.

programs.title: Why Trains Crash
programs.desc: On 2 June 2023 a devastating train crash in India killed nearly 300 people. What caused it, could it have been prevented, and is enough being done globally to ensure our railways are safe?

programs.title: Kochie's Business Builders
programs.desc: This week we meet Trevor, founder of WildKids Australia, a program reconnecting kids with nature through outdoor learning and play. From bug hunts to bush adventures, kids are loving it.
